reason_kept_or_rejected: Old builder HTTP execution surface is a prime survivable part but must be narrowed to one-step exact execution.
known_risks: Old route mixes policy, validation, and compatibility logic.
acceptance_proof_required: Target file exists and remains execute-one-step-only.

reason_kept_or_rejected: Preflight discipline is valuable and belongs in Builder boundary enforcement.
known_risks: Old preflight is broader than the new minimal runtime contract.
acceptance_proof_required: Target file preserves explicit sandbox denial outside boundary.

known_risks: Old verifier is wired to older BuilderOS assumptions.
required_refactors: Do not allow self-certification by Builder.
acceptance_proof_required: Target file explicitly verifies against acceptance tests and output contract.

reason_kept_or_rejected: Proof freshness engine is one of the strongest honesty tools and survives under SENTRY.
known_risks: Old OIL naming must not survive into new canonical payloads.
acceptance_proof_required: Target file blocks stale proof from counting as current proof.

reason_kept_or_rejected: Memory authority and lesson tracking are valuable but must be narrowed under Historian.
known_risks: Old memory service spans more than the clean Historian role.

reason_kept_or_rejected: Caching substrate is valuable but needs governance before trust.
known_risks: Generic caching can outrank governed proof if left ungated.
required_refactors: Cache promotion must require stability evidence and no authority conflict.
acceptance_proof_required: Target file states cache never outranks governed proof.

reason_kept_or_rejected: Routing and cost discipline are real gold under TSOS.
known_risks: Routing optimization can drift into authority if not bounded.
required_refactors: Do not let routing rewrite strategy.
acceptance_proof_required: Target file requires measured upside and review.

reason_kept_or_rejected: Readiness fail-closed and fake-green defense survive the reboot.
known_risks: Old readiness terms still reflect older BuilderOS maturity surfaces.
acceptance_proof_required: Target file cannot report ready without governed proof.

reason_kept_or_rejected: Command-center observability logic is useful but must collapse into C2 as a LifeOS module.
known_risks: Old command-center variants mixed communication and control surfaces.
required_refactors: Do not model C2 as a separate brain.
acceptance_proof_required: Target charter explicitly states C2 is inside LifeOS and not a department.
